_description: JavaScript-embedded JSON arrays from variable assignments (TG3442DE pattern)

content.text:
<html><body><script type="text/javascript">
js_dsNums = '4';
js_usNums = '2';
json_dsData = [{"ChannelType":"SC-QAM","Modulation":"QAM256","Frequency":"507 MHz","PowerLevel":"3.2 dBmV","SNRLevel":"38.5 dB","LockStatus":"Locked","ChannelID":"1"},{"ChannelType":"SC-QAM","Modulation":"QAM256","Frequency":"513 MHz","PowerLevel":"3.1 dBmV","SNRLevel":"37.8 dB","LockStatus":"Locked","ChannelID":"2"}];
json_usData = [{"ChannelType":"ATDMA","Modulation":"QAM64","Frequency":"37.7 MHz","PowerLevel":"45.0 dBmV","ChannelID":"1"}];
</script></body></html>
